creative_premise: Afterimage can reveal a temporary constellation without storing a visitor history: an explicit Trace gesture connects the current deterministic field into one bounded nearest-neighbor path.

implementation.trace_rule: deterministic nearest-neighbor traversal with stable identifier tie-breaking

accessibility.mobile_layout: controls compress within viewport at 430px and below

verification.environment: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical proposed module and test content before commit
assertions: same inputs produce identical scene and trace
existing viewport, complexity, and PRNG invariants remain valid

limits: No public hosting deployment was performed in this run.
No physical mobile browser screenshot or performance trace was captured.
The browser integration was reviewed structurally but not executed in a connector-hosted browser.
